notes: Beta build 2026.07.22-380 — thanks for testing! New: private access. When it's switched on, the app asks for a tester password the first time you open it (Tony will share it with you); enter it once and it's remembered on that device — and it's verified on the server, so the beta stays invite-only. Everything else is unchanged. Anything odd, confusing or brilliant: use the ✉ feedback link in the top-left.
